sections.title: Attempting to trade with the Bartender

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Get out of here, we don't like your sort in these parts.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Get out of here. I have nothing to say to the likes of you.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: So you're the [fella/lass] that freed Azzanadra, huh? Fair play to ya. What will you have?

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Didn't feel like a drink after all, huh? Well, stop by anytime, hero.
